metadata.rationale: 样本文本确实反映了该说法在社交平台的传播与“口径不清”的争议，但同时通过被编辑的“战报截图”和被处理过的门店人流图，把不明来源的网络说法包装成更像“发布会当晚、全渠道、34分钟纯新增锁单”的既定事实，造成时间与场景语境的明显误导。

best_trajectory.action: VQA[What is the large text displayed in the center of the image regarding the number of orders and time?]
best_trajectory.observation:
The large text in the center reads **"34分钟 15000台"**.

Below that, smaller text says **"锁单突破"** (Lock-in orders exceeded).

Together, it translates to: "34 minutes, 15,000 units, lock-in orders exceeded."

best_trajectory.thought: The central text "34分钟 15000台" in the image directly matches the key claim "34分钟锁单1.5万台" in the news text. The image also features a top bar with "03/19 22:34", "全渠道", and "新一代SU7 34分钟锁单15000+", which corresponds to the text's description of a screenshot with specific timestamps and channel information. Furthermore, the watermark "来自社交平台流传截图" (from social media circulating screenshot) at the bottom right confirms this image is the subject of the news report. Thus, the image and text match.

prediction.taxonomy_rationale: The provided images, particularly the second one with gibberish text and the first one which appears to be a generated poster/screenshot, are synthetic visual content (V1), despite the text reporting on a real sales claim.
